styleSelect.title: Choose your companion style
styleSelect.subtitle: Each style has its own unique companions and evolutionary lines
styleSelect.3dDesc: Immersive 3D animals with depth and shadow
styleSelect.2dDesc: Flat kawaii illustrations — soft and charming

deleteAllConfirm: This will permanently delete your companion and all progress. Are you sure?

onboarding.welcome: Hi! {{name}} is happy you're here. Start by taking care of them 🌱

speciesSelect.title: Who will join you?
speciesSelect.subtitle: Each companion follows a unique path of growth

evolutionPanel.title: Your journey
evolutionPanel.hintNoSignature: Every small act of care counts
evolutionPanel.complete: {{name}} has blossomed ✨ You did this together

zephyr.name: Zephyr
zephyr.description: A little ice-blue penguin who teaches the rhythm of letting go. Its steady waddle mirrors the calm of a slow, deep breath. Grows from a small chick into a radiant, crown-wearing companion.

kova.name: Kova
kova.description: A warm tabby cat who embodies calm presence and gentle grounding. Always cozy, always here. Grows from a soft kitten into a wise, flower-crowned companion.

luma.name: Luma
luma.description: A golden bear cub whose warmth grows with every moment of connection. Soft and huggable, a reminder that hope is always close. Grows from a tiny cub into a glowing, halo-blessed companion.

maru.name: Maru
maru.description: A lavender duck who floats through life with gentle acceptance. Its unhurried pace teaches that all feelings pass in their own time. Grows from a downy duckling into a serene, ring-adorned companion.

nimbus.name: Nimbus
nimbus.description: A dreamy wisp who teaches you to float above worries. Gentle and ethereal, it grows from a tiny shimmer into a radiant dream guardian. Rest with Nimbus and let heaviness fade away.

boba.name: Boba
boba.description: A small cosmic orb that holds the serenity of deep space. Its quiet glow grows with every playful moment, reminding you that you are part of something vast and beautiful.

mochi.name: Mochi
mochi.description: A cozy round companion that radiates warmth like a soft hug. Sweet and unhurried, it reminds you that comfort is always within reach. Grows from a small dough into a glowing bliss companion.

nuri.name: Nuri
nuri.description: A lively green cat full of gentle curiosity. Its presence encourages you to notice small wonders in each day. Grows from a curious spark into a joyful wanderer full of quiet delight.
